cards.back: A last-in-first-out (LIFO) data structure where elements are added and removed from the top
A first-in-first-out (FIFO) data structure where elements are added to the end and removed from the front

cards.front: What is a Tree data structure?
cards.back: A hierarchical data structure where each node has a value and zero or more child nodes

cards.front: What is a Graph data structure?
cards.back: A non-linear data structure consisting of nodes or vertices connected by edges
A data structure that stores key-value pairs in an array using a hash function to map keys to indices
